tokenUsage.accumulatedHint: Accumulated across entire session without duplication

tabs.generalDesc: Core app preferences like theme, language, display density, and startup behavior.
tabs.notificationsDesc: Control when and how you get notified about agent activity, task completions, and errors.
tabs.advancedDesc: Power-user options: export/import config, reset defaults, and raw configuration editing.
tabs.connectionDesc: Manage CLI connection and authentication settings.

general.launchAtLoginDesc: Automatically start the app when you log in
general.showDockIconDesc: Display the app icon in the dock (macOS)
general.expandAIResponsesDesc: Automatically expand each response turn when opening a transcript or receiving a new message
general.nativeTitleBarDesc: Use the default system window frame instead of the custom title bar
general.restartRequiredMsg: The app needs to restart to apply the title bar change. Restart now?
general.localClaudeRootDesc: Choose which local folder is treated as your Claude data root
general.selectedFolderNotClaudeMsg: This folder is named "{{name}}", not ".claude". Continue anyway?
general.noProjectsDirMsg: This folder does not contain a "projects" directory. Continue anyway?
general.detectedWslDists: Detected WSL distributions and Claude root candidates
general.noWslPathsMsg: Could not find WSL distros with Claude data automatically. Select folder manually?
general.wslPathMissingMsg: "{{path}}" does not contain a "projects" directory. Continue anyway?
general.enableServerModeDesc: Start an HTTP server to access the UI from a browser or embed in iframes
general.standaloneMode: Running in standalone mode. The HTTP server is always active. System notifications are not available — notification triggers are logged in-app only.
general.sendCrashReportsDesc: Help improve the app by sending anonymous crash and performance data

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.devModeDesc: Notifications may not work in development mode. macOS identifies the app as "Electron" (bundle ID com.github.Electron) instead of the production app name. Check System Settings → Notifications → Electron to verify permissions.
notifications.enableSystemNotificationsDesc: Show system notifications for errors and events
notifications.playSoundDesc: Play a sound when notifications appear
notifications.includeSubagentErrorsDesc: Detect and notify about errors in subagent sessions
notifications.testNotificationDesc: Send a test notification to verify delivery
notifications.leadInboxDesc: Notify when teammates send messages to the team lead
notifications.userInboxDesc: Notify when teammates send messages to you
notifications.taskClarificationDesc: Show native OS notifications when a task needs your input
notifications.taskCommentDesc: Show native OS notifications when agents comment on tasks
notifications.taskCreatedDesc: Show native OS notifications when a new task is created
notifications.allTasksCompletedDesc: Notify when every task in a team reaches completed status
notifications.crossTeamMessageDesc: Notify when a message arrives from another team
notifications.teamLaunchedDesc: Notify when a team finishes launching and is ready
notifications.toolApprovalDesc: Notify when a tool needs your approval (Allow/Deny) while the app is not focused
notifications.taskStatusChangeDesc: Show native OS notifications when a task's status changes
notifications.onlySoloModeDesc: Notify only when the team has no teammates
notifications.notifyOnStatusesDesc: Which target statuses trigger a notification
notifications.taskCompletionDesc: Get native OS notifications when Claude finishes tasks — sounds, banners, and Dock/taskbar badges. Works on macOS, Linux, and Windows.
notifications.ignoredReposDesc: Notifications from these repositories will be ignored

triggers.builtinTriggersDesc: Default triggers that come with the application. You can enable/disable them and customize their patterns.
triggers.customTriggersDesc: Create your own triggers to get notified for specific patterns or tool outputs.
triggers.errorStatusDesc: Triggers when a tool execution reports an error (is_error: true).
triggers.matchPatternHint: Leave empty to match all content. Uses JavaScript regex syntax.
triggers.ignorePatternsHint: Press Enter to add. Notification is skipped if any pattern matches.
triggers.limitToRepos: Limit to Repositories (applies only to selected repositories)
triggers.noReposSelected: No repositories selected - trigger applies to all repositories
triggers.repoScopeHint: When repositories are selected, this trigger only fires for errors in those repositories.
triggers.searchStoppedEarly: Search stopped early (timeout or count limit). Actual matches may be higher.

advanced.appDescription: Assemble AI agent teams that work autonomously in parallel, communicate across teams, and manage tasks on a kanban board — with built-in code review, live process monitoring, and full tool visibility.

connection.remoteConnectionDesc: Connect to a remote machine to view Claude Code sessions running there

errors.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred in the application. You can try reloading the page or resetting the error state.
errors.bugReportDisclaimer: GitHub bug reports and copied diagnostics include the error message, stack traces, app version, active tab, selected team, task context, and environment details.

search.typeAtLeast2: Type at least 2 characters to search
search.noFastResults: No fast results in recent sessions for "{{query}}"

sidebar.selectProjectHint: Select a project to view sessions
sidebar.noSessionsYet: This project has no sessions yet

team.noTeamsFoundDesc: Create a team in Claude Code, then refresh the list.

createTask.title: Create Task
createTask.description: The task will be created in the team's tasks/ directory and appear on the Kanban board.
createTask.offlineNotice: Team is offline. The task will be added to **TODO** — launch the team to start execution.
createTask.subject: Subject
createTask.promptPlaceholder: Custom instructions for the team member...
createTask.offlineStartNotice: Team is offline. Launch the team first to start tasks immediately.

review.placeholder: Describe what needs to change... (Enter to submit)
review.autoViewedOn: Auto-mark files as viewed when scrolled to end (ON)
review.autoViewedOff: Auto-mark files as viewed when scrolled to end (OFF)
review.acceptAllTooltip: Accept all changes across all files
review.rejectAllTooltip: Reject all changes across all files
review.applyAllTooltip: Apply review decisions across all files
review.fileModifiedSinceAgent: This file was modified after the agent's changes. Please review carefully.

diffLoading.title: Loading full diff
diffLoading.subtitleCurrent: Preparing full diff for the current file…
diffLoading.subtitleMany: Preparing full diffs for several files…
diffLoading.hintMany: {{ready}} ready, {{loading}} still loading — snippets remain usable.
diffLoading.hintOne: Snippets remain usable while the full diff loads.

scope.tier1Detail: The changes stay within the expected scope.
scope.tier2Detail: Some details are worth a quick review.
scope.tier3Detail: Review the scope carefully before applying.
scope.tier4Detail: Changes go beyond expected scope. Review before applying.

editor.recoveredUnsavedChanges: Recovered unsaved changes from a previous session.
editor.fileDeletedOnDisk: File no longer exists on disk.
editor.unsavedChangesDesc: You have unsaved changes. What would you like to do?
editor.unsavedChangesFileDesc: This file has unsaved changes. What would you like to do?
editor.saveConflictDesc: The file has been modified externally since you opened it. Overwrite with your changes?
editor.selectFileToEdit: Select a file from the tree to edit

actionMode.doTooltip: Full execution mode - can change code/state, run commands, or delegate
actionMode.askTooltip: Read-only discussion mode - no code/state changes or commands
actionMode.delegateTooltip: Lead-only orchestration - delegate everything, do not execute yourself

composer.teamMustBeOnline: Team must be online to attach files
composer.placeholder: Write a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
composer.teamLaunching: Team is launching... message will be queued for inbox delivery.
composer.sendingUnavailable: Sending unavailable while team is launching
composer.attachmentsDisabledHint: File attachments are only supported when sending to the team lead while the team is online. Remove attachments or switch recipient.

approval.responseTimedOut: Response timed out — process may be unresponsive. Try again or stop the team.

members.label: Members
members.modelSelectorInfo: Leave blank to use the team default.
members.noTasksAssigned: No tasks assigned to this member
members.noLoadedMessagesYet: No loaded messages for this member yet
members.linesApproxInfo: Approximate. Accurate for Edit and Write tools. Bash file writes are estimated from command patterns (heredoc, echo, sed) and may be underreported.
members.taskInProgressWaiting: Task is in progress — waiting for session activity (auto-refreshing)...
members.noSessionForTask: No session activity for this task yet
members.noRecordedActivity: This member has no recorded session activity yet
members.leadSessionTooltip: Full team lead session logs — useful for global orchestration context, not specific to this agent

teamDetail.teamNotLaunchedDesc: This is a draft team — {{name}} has been configured with {{count}} member{{plural}} but hasn't been provisioned by CLI yet. Click Launch to select a model and start the team.
teamDetail.teamDataPending: Team data will appear once provisioning completes
teamDetail.openLeadSessionContext: Open the team lead session to view context.

teamList.onlyLocalMode: Only available in local Electron mode.
teamList.teamsOnlyElectron: Teams is only available in Electron mode
teamList.teamsOnlyElectronDesc: In browser mode, access to local `~/.claude/teams` directories is not available.
teamList.deleteDraftConfirm: Delete draft team "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
teamList.moveToTrashConfirm: Move team "{{name}}" to trash? You can restore it later.
teamList.deletePermanentlyConfirm: Delete team "{{name}}" permanently? All data will be lost.

sendMessage.title: Send Message
sendMessage.description: Send a direct message to a team member.
sendMessage.teamMustBeOnline: Team must be online to attach files
sendMessage.filesOnlyToLead: Files can only be sent to the team lead
sendMessage.disabledAttachmentHint: File attachments are only supported when sending to the team lead while the team is online. Remove attachments or switch recipient.

launch.startTeamDesc: Start team <mono>{{name}}</mono> via local Claude CLI.
launch.conflictWarningTitle: Another team "{{name}}" is already running for this working directory
launch.conflictWarningDesc: Running two teams in the same directory is risky — they may conflict editing the same files. Consider using a different directory or a git worktree for isolation.
launch.cliNotInstalledTitle: Claude CLI is not installed — launch is blocked
launch.installFromDashboard: Install Claude CLI from the Dashboard, then reopen this dialog.
launch.noTeamsAvailable: No teams available. Create a team first.
launch.labelPlaceholder: e.g., Daily code review, Nightly tests...
launch.optionalLaunchDesc: Keep the launch flow focused on the project path and only expand this when you want extra control.
launch.promptSchedulePlaceholder: Instructions for Claude to execute on schedule...
launch.promptOneShotHint: This prompt will be passed to claude -p for one-shot execution
launch.clearContextWarning: The team lead will start a new session without resuming previous context. All accumulated session memory and conversation history will not be available.
launch.preFlightCheck: Pre-flight check to catch errors before launch

toolApproval.autoAllowSafeBash: Auto-allow safe commands (git, pnpm, npm, ls...)

fileSectionHeader.fileMissingDesc: We can still show a preview from agent logs, but your filesystem is out of sync.
fileSectionHeader.restoreHint: Use <bold>Restore</bold> to write the preview content back to disk.
fileSectionHeader.noRestoreAvailable: Full file content is not available to restore automatically.
fileSectionHeader.acceptRejectDisabled: Accept/Reject is disabled while the file is missing on disk.
fileSectionHeader.restoreTooltip: Create/restore this file on disk from the preview
fileSectionHeader.discardTooltip: Discard all edits for this file

createTeamDialog.copyTeamDesc: Create a new team based on an existing one.
createTeamDialog.createTeamDesc: Team provisioning via local Claude CLI.
createTeamDialog.conflictWarningTitle: Another team "{{name}}" is already running for this working directory
createTeamDialog.conflictWarningDesc: Running two teams in the same directory is risky — they may conflict editing the same files. Consider using a different directory or a git worktree for isolation.
createTeamDialog.cliBlockedTitle: CLI environment is not available — launch is blocked
createTeamDialog.cliBlockedHint: Make sure <mono>claude</mono> CLI is installed and available in PATH, then reopen this dialog.
createTeamDialog.electronOnly: Available only in local Electron mode.
createTeamDialog.soloTeamHint: Only the team lead (main process) will be started — no teammates will be spawned. Works like a regular Claude session but with access to the task board for planning. Saves tokens by avoiding teammate coordination overhead. You can add members later from the team settings.
createTeamDialog.runCommandAfterCreateDesc: Start the team immediately via local Claude CLI.
createTeamDialog.optionalLaunchSettingsDesc: Prompt, model, safety, and CLI overrides live here when you need them.
createTeamDialog.promptForLeadPlaceholder: Instructions for the team lead during provisioning...
createTeamDialog.optionalTeamDetailsDesc: Keep the default flow compact and only open this when you want extra context or a custom color.
createTeamDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of the team purpose
createTeamDialog.preFlightCheck: Pre-flight check to catch errors before launch
createTeamDialog.nameMustContain: Name must contain at least one letter or digit
createTeamDialog.memberNameInvalid: Member name must start with alphanumeric, use only [a-zA-Z0-9._-], max 128 chars
createTeamDialog.preloadOutdated: Current preload version does not support team:prepareProvisioning. Restart the dev app.
createTeamDialog.selectCwdToValidate: Select a working directory to validate the launch environment.
createTeamDialog.failedWarmup: Failed to warm up Claude CLI environment

optionalSettingsSection.collapsedHint: Collapsed by default to keep the primary flow focused.

effortLevelSelector.title: Effort level (optional)
effortLevelSelector.description: Controls how much reasoning Claude invests before responding. Default uses Claude's standard behavior.

limitContextCheckbox.label: Limit context to 200K tokens
limitContextCheckbox.tooltip: Agents will use 200K context window instead of the default 1M. Useful if you want to save tokens and reduce costs.

skipPermissionsCheckbox.label: Auto-approve all tools
skipPermissionsCheckbox.enabledHint: Unleash Claude's full power — no interruptions asking for permission. Autonomous mode — all tools execute without confirmation. Be cautious with untrusted code.
skipPermissionsCheckbox.disabledHint: Manual mode — you'll approve or deny each tool call in real-time.

teamModelSelector.title: Model (optional)
teamModelSelector.defaultTooltipSub: Currently Sonnet 4.6, but may change with CLI updates.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.pluginsDesc: Small add-ons for Claude. They give the app extra features and integrations.
extensions.mcpServersDesc: Connections to outside tools and apps. They let Claude read data from external sources.

skills.createDescription: Describe the workflow in plain language, review the files that will be created, then save it.
skills.editDescription: Update this skill, review the resulting file changes, then save it.
skills.basicsDescription: Give this skill a clear name, choose who can use it, and decide where it should live.
skills.folderNameHint: We suggest this automatically from the skill name so review works right away.
skills.invocationManualOnly: Only when you ask for it
skills.instructionsDescription: These sections generate the skill file for you, so you do not need to edit markdown unless you want to.
skills.whenClaudeShouldReach: When Claude should reach for this
skills.structuredFieldsLocked: Structured fields are locked because you switched to manual `SKILL.md` editing below.
skills.extraFilesDescription: Add supporting docs, scripts, or assets only if this skill really needs them.
skills.optionalFilesHint: Add starter files that will be included in the review and written together with `SKILL.md`.
skills.rootAndFolderLocked: Root and folder are locked for edits
skills.referencesDescription: Add supporting docs, links, or examples that Claude can look at.
skills.scriptsDescription: Add helper commands or setup notes. Review carefully before sharing this skill.
skills.assetsDescription: Add screenshots or bundled media only if they help explain the workflow.
skills.advancedEditorCustomDescription: This skill uses a custom markdown format, so edit it directly here.
skills.advancedEditorDescription: Most people can skip this. Open it only if you want direct control over the raw markdown file.
skills.reviewHint: Review the file changes first, then confirm save in the next step.
skills.validationNameRequired: Add a skill name so people know what this workflow is for.
skills.validationDescriptionRequired: Add a short description so it is clear what this skill helps with.
skills.validationFolderRequired: Choose a folder name for this skill.
skills.validationProjectRequired: Project skills need an active project.
skills.detailDescription: Inspect discovered skill metadata and raw instructions.
skills.invocationManualLabel: Claude will only use this when you explicitly ask for it.
skills.invocationAutoLabel: Claude can pick this automatically when it matches the task.
skills.reviewCarefully: Review this skill carefully before using it
skills.deleteConfirmWithName: Delete "{{name}}" and move it to Trash? You can restore it later from Trash if needed.
skills.deleteConfirmGeneric: Delete this skill and move it to Trash?
skills.importDescription: Pick an existing skill folder, review what will be copied, then import it into one of your supported skill locations.
skills.chooseSkillFolderHint: This should be a folder that already contains a `SKILL.md`, `Skill.md`, or `skill.md` file.
skills.decideWhereHint: Personal skills work everywhere. Project skills only show up for one codebase.
skills.reviewCopiedHint: Review the copied files first, then confirm the import in the next step.
skills.panelDescriptionWithProject: Skills are reusable instructions that help Claude handle the same kind of task more consistently. You are seeing skills for {{label}} plus your personal skills.
skills.panelDescriptionWithoutProject: Skills are reusable instructions that help Claude handle the same kind of task more consistently. You are seeing only your personal skills right now.
skills.panelHint: Use personal skills for habits you want everywhere. Use project skills for workflows that only make sense inside one codebase.
skills.searchPlaceholder: Search by skill name or what it helps with...
skills.noSkillsMatchHint: Try a different search term or switch filters.
skills.noSkillsYetHint: Create your first skill to teach Claude a repeatable workflow, or import one you already use.
skills.projectSkillsHint: Workflows that only make sense for this codebase.
skills.personalSkillsHint: Habits and instructions you want Claude to remember everywhere.
skills.invocationManualHint: Only runs when you explicitly ask for it
skills.invocationAutoHint: Claude can use this automatically when it fits
skills.statusNeedsAttention: Needs attention before you rely on it
skills.statusHasScripts: Includes scripts, so review it carefully
skills.errorNotSkill: This folder does not look like a skill yet. It needs a SKILL.md, Skill.md, or skill.md file.
skills.errorSymlinks: This folder contains symbolic links. Import the real files instead of links.
skills.errorTooManyFiles: This skill folder is too large to import at once. Remove extra files and try again.
skills.errorTooLarge: This skill folder is too large to import safely. Trim large assets and try again.
skills.errorInvalidFolderName: Pick a simpler destination folder name using letters, numbers, dots, dashes, or underscores.
skills.errorNotDirectory: Choose a folder to import, not a single file.
skills.whenToUsePlaceholder: Example: Use this when the task is a code review or bug triage request.
skills.stepsPlaceholder:
1. Inspect the relevant files.
2. Explain the main risk first.
3. Suggest the safest fix.
skills.notesPlaceholder: Example: Call out missing tests, regressions, and risky assumptions.
skills.reviewDialogDescription: {{label}} previews the filesystem changes first. Nothing is written until you confirm below.
skills.reviewDiffHint: Review the diff below, then use <0>{{confirmLabel}}</0> to apply these changes.
skills.binaryNotShown: Binary file preview is not shown. The file will be copied as-is.

extensions.skillsDesc: Ready-made instructions for common jobs. They help Claude follow specific workflows.

apiKeys.headerDescription: Securely store API keys for auto-filling when installing MCP servers.
apiKeys.keychainTooltip: Keys are encrypted via {{backend}} and stored with restricted file permissions (owner-only).
apiKeys.fallbackTooltip: OS keychain unavailable — keys are encrypted locally with AES-256. For stronger protection, install a keyring service (gnome-keyring, kwallet).
apiKeys.noKeysHint: Add keys to auto-fill environment variables when installing MCP servers.
apiKeys.editDescription: Update the key details. You must re-enter the value.
apiKeys.addDescription: Store an API key for auto-filling in MCP server installations.
apiKeys.keychainWarning: OS keychain unavailable — keys encrypted with AES-256 locally. Install gnome-keyring for OS-level protection.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.envVarFormatHint: Use letters, digits, underscores. Must start with a letter or underscore.

extensions.apiKeysDesc: Secret keys for online services. Add them here so plugins can use them safely.
extensions.cliNotAvailableDesc: Plugin installs are disabled until Claude CLI is installed.
extensions.cliReadyDesc: Plugins can be installed from this page.
extensions.desktopOnly: Available in the desktop app only.
extensions.cliRequired: Claude CLI is required to install or uninstall extensions.
extensions.restartNotice: Running sessions won't pick up extension changes until restarted.

mcp.addCustomDescription: Add a server manually without the catalog.
mcp.serverNameInvalid: Invalid server name. Use alphanumeric characters, dashes, underscores, dots.
mcp.author: Author
mcp.remoteHeadersNotice: Remote MCP servers may still require custom headers or API keys even when the registry does not describe them. If connection fails after install, check the provider docs.
mcp.manualSetupNotice: This server requires manual setup. Check the repository for installation instructions.

cli.firstCheckHint: First check may take up to 30 seconds
cli.failedToCheckUpdates: Failed to check for updates. Check your network connection and try again.
cli.statusWillBeChecked: Claude CLI status will be checked in the background.
cli.cliRequiredDesc: Claude CLI is required for team provisioning and session management. Install it to get started.
cli.notLoggedInDesc: Claude CLI is installed but you are not authenticated. Login is required for team provisioning and AI features.
cli.troubleshootTitle: If you're sure you're logged in, try these steps:
cli.troubleshootStep1Hint: sometimes the status is cached for a few seconds
cli.troubleshootStep3: If it says logged in but the app doesn't see it, try:
cli.troubleshootStep4Hint: in your terminal is the same binary the app uses
cli.loginOnlyForTeams: Browsing sessions and projects works without login. Login is only needed to run agent teams.
cli.notInstalledWarning: Claude Code is not installed. Install it from the Dashboard to enable all features.

chat.noMessagesYet: This session does not contain any messages yet.
chat.conversationCompactedDesc: Previous messages were summarized to save context. The full conversation history is preserved in the session file.
chat.newContextInjectedTitle: New Context Injected In This Turn
chat.visibleContextDesc: Tokens consumed by file reads, tool outputs, and configuration files (CLAUDE.md) that are injected into the conversation.
chat.totalDesc: Total tokens that are injected into the conversation
chat.visibleDesc: Subset of tokens that you can optimize & debug
chat.largeContentRawTitle: Large content is shown as raw to prevent UI freeze
chat.largeContentNotice: Content is very large ({{count}} chars). Showing raw preview to keep the UI responsive.

schedules.title: Schedules
schedules.emptyStateDescription: Create a schedule on any team to automate Claude task execution with cron expressions. Schedules from all teams will appear here.
schedules.noMatchingFilters: No schedules match the current filters
